name: Hound Master
description: Optional R.C.C. (GM approval) — elite Hound troop leaders with horns, black capes, speech, minor psionics, and illusion shells to pass as humans. Diabolic or Miscreant only (never Aberrant or good); book discourages player characters except evil or ruthless anarchist renegades. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_hound_master_rcc` (auto-mounted). A.R. 14 vs normal weapons. Typical experience level 2D4+1.

activation.duration: 10 minutes per level (self) or 5 minutes per level (two to five disguised)
activation.save: Illusion Shells — psionic disguise; max five Hounds on undercover missions

metadata.renegadeNotes: May betray overlords for another Nightlord or go renegade; brigands, sorcerer pawns, or Earth street-gang controllers (conflict with Warlords)

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — may live centuries; usually killed in combat

classAbilities.name: Illusion & Concealment Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to all illusions and powers of concealment — sees through Shroud Talent, invisibility, and magical or psionic disguise/camouflage.

classAbilities.name: Illusion Shells
classAbilities.description: Psionic disguise: 4 I.S.P. to mask self; 8 I.S.P. to disguise up to five others (typically pass as normal humans). Duration 10 minutes per level (self) or 5 minutes per level (two to five people). Maximum five Hounds disguised on undercover missions — see innateBonuses.activation.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 2000 ft (610 m). Expert tracker (animals and humans at 80%). Natural tracking skill 85% on race row. +4 on all Perception rolls; +2 on initiative (apply at table — see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Tracking
classAbilities.description: Smell and track supernatural creatures within 80 ft (24.4 m); base 50% + 5% per level.

classAbilities.name: Self-Healing
classAbilities.description: Heals all damage if allowed to stand still for one full hour (regenerative trance).

classAbilities.name: Partial Invulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes half damage from all non-magical weapons and attacks.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with one additional strike/attack per melee round from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 14 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks. Horned exoskeleton and black cape — no worn body armor.

classAbilities.name: Innate Psionics
classAbilities.description: Minor psychic — Mind Block and Empathy at 1st level (shadow O.C.C. ispEngine), plus Illusion Shells above. I.S.P. M.E. + 1D6×10 + 2D6 per level.

classAbilities.name: Magic Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes double damage from magic artifacts, magic weapons, Nightbane Talents, and powers/spells.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Speak all languages magically.

classAbilities.name: Darkblade Spears
classAbilities.description: Primary weapon — 3D6 plus P.S. damage; cuts through all known materials. Rarely issued other weapons.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Serve Nightlords and avatars; lead Hounds (`race_hound`, 20+) or undercover teams of 3–5 disguised Hounds. Sometimes commanded by Dopplegangers or Hollow Men; work alongside Hunters (`race_hunter`). Solo missions rare — usually left to Night Princes or Avatars. Renegades may serve other Nightlords, hunt humans, or control street gangs.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 2D4+1 (Hound & Hunter XP table via shadow O.C.C.).

name: Snake Bird
description: Optional R.C.C. (GM approval) — sentient feathered-serpent spellcasters resembling extinct feathered serpents; eagle-like fliers with squawking speech and natural wizard magic. Lone hunters or mated pairs; may befriend magicians or serve Nightlords as torturers. Player characters at GM discretion — uses Mystic experience table via shadow O.C.C. `occ_snake_bird_rcc`. Typical experience level 1D6+1; a few reach 12th level and beyond.

activation.save: Lethal poison — save vs poison each melee or 3D6 direct to H.P. first round and 1D6 per melee (half on success); affects supernatural beings

metadata.spellPoolGmNote: Nightbane, Palladium Fantasy, Rifts, Beyond the Supernatural

demographics.averageHeight: Body 4–5 ft (1.2–1.5 m); wingspan 7–10 ft (2.1–3 m)

classAbilities.name: Flight & Senses
classAbilities.description: Powerful flier (eagle-like maneuvers). Sense supernatural creatures within 100 ft (30.5 m). Exceptional vision 2 miles (3.2 km); nightvision 500 ft (152 m).

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Regenerate 5 S.D.C./H.P. at the end of each melee round.

classAbilities.name: Natural Spell Casting
classAbilities.description: Innate wizard-style magic — six spells (levels 1–3) at 1st level, then two new spells per level (equal or below current level). P.P.E. P.E.×5 + 12 per level on shadow O.C.C. All other magic rules as Mystic O.C.C. (no psychic abilities). G.M. may allow spells from Nightbane, Palladium Fantasy, Rifts, and Beyond the Supernatural.

classAbilities.name: Combat — Natural Abilities
classAbilities.description: Three attacks per melee at 1st level (or two while casting by magic); +1 attack at levels 4 and 8. +1 initiative and +1 on all Perception rolls; +5 strike and +5 dodge in the air (+2 strike/dodge on ground); +6 damage on swooping attacks — apply at table (see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Claw & Poison Bite
classAbilities.description: Claws 2D6 S.D.C. Bite 1D6 plus lethal poison — see innateBonuses.activation. Affects supernatural beings.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Speaks Dragonese (mythical tongue of dragons, elves, and faerie) at 98%. Two additional languages of choice at +20% via shadow O.C.C. picks.

classAbilities.name: Hit Points per Level
classAbilities.description: True H.P. = P.E. + 1D4 per level of experience (catalog `PE+1D4` is 1st-level baseline; add 1D4 each level).

classAbilities.name: Habitat & Enemies
classAbilities.description: Any terrain; prefers mountains. Nightlands, Earth, and other dimensions. Enemies: large predators, Nightlords and their minions. May befriend magicians or Nightbane; evil specimens sometimes serve Nightlords torturing humans and Dopplegangers.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D6+1 (Mystic / Snakebird XP table via shadow O.C.C.); a few reach near-legendary 12th+ levels.

name: Night Prince
description: Ba'al-Zebul — chief lieutenants of the `race_nightlord` (rank below Avatars). Human-looking illusion masters and energy vampires; infiltrators, cult leaders, and war commanders on Earth since antiquity. Also called Night Princes or Night Squires (low-level, undistinguished). GM approval only — player characters discouraged but possible at G.M. discretion. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_night_prince_rcc` (auto-mounted). S.D.C. 2D4×10+120; H.P. P.E.×2 (+2D6/level). P.P.E. 1D4×100 (+15/level). Typical experience 1D4+4. Horror Factor 9 (illusions up to 18).

activation.save: Save vs magic when victim suspects illusion; Difficult Perception or worse for multi-sense illusions

classAbilities.name: Hit Points & P.P.E. Scaling
classAbilities.description: True H.P. = P.E.×2 + 2D6 per level (catalog `PE*2+12` approximates mid-tier). P.P.E. +15 per level after base 1D4×100 (shadow O.C.C. `ppeEngine`).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Endurance
classAbilities.description: Heal 1D4×10 S.D.C./H.P. every minute (4 melees). See invisible and all illusions (including other Night Princes'). Impervious to mind control. Nightvision 500 ft (152 m). Sense ley lines/nexus 1 mile (1.6 km). No food, water, or air required.

classAbilities.name: Energy Vampirism
classAbilities.description: 5 H.P./P.P.E. per day minimum to survive; 10–20/day for satisfaction. Miss a meal: −1 P.P.E. (restore with +5 extra on next feeding). At 0 P.P.E., lose 1 P.E./day until dust.

classAbilities.name: Illusionary Powers
classAbilities.description: P.P.E.-fueled constructs — see innateBonuses.activation and metadata for tier costs, range, volume, and Horror Factor caps. Death-by-illusion shock rules apply. May fake spellcasting with illusion effects.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with +1 attack per melee from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers). Supernatural strength damage.

classAbilities.name: Perception Bonus
classAbilities.description: +5 on Perception rolls (apply at table — see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Double damage from Nightbane attacks/Talents and Guardian energy powers.

classAbilities.name: Night Squires
classAbilities.description: Low-level, undistinguished Night Princes — same R.C.C., lower experience.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Often command Hound Masters (`race_hound_master`), Hollow Men (`race_hollow_man`), and Ashmedai (`race_ashmedai`); may lead full Nightlord armies. Infiltrate high society, Preserver Party networks, and NSB-adjacent power structures.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4+4 (Night Prince & Vampire XP table via shadow O.C.C.).

name: Millek
description: Optional astral-native R.C.C. (GM approval) — tall, psychic guides and explorers of the Astral Plane; freedom-loving anarchists who hate Nightlord tyranny. Young player characters typically start at 1st–2nd level. Cannot materialize on Earth or the Nightlands (astral form only unless the character has astral projection/transference). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_millek_rcc` (auto-mounted).

cost.value: passive daily drain when outside Astral Plane beyond 3 miles (4.8 km) of ley line/nexus

activation.duration: until returned to ambient Astral Plane P.P.E. or ley-line/nexus range
activation.save: P.P.E. dependency — no save; lose 1D6 P.P.E. and 1D4 H.P. per day. Coma if P.P.E. or H.P. reaches zero; death within 24 hours if not taken to a P.P.E.-rich area (pp. 65–66).

classAbilities.name: Astral Navigation (Innate)
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to the astral navigation psychic power — automatic, no I.S.P. cost (`metadata.psionicGrantIds`, `astralNavigationAutomaticNoIsp`) (pp. 64–65).

classAbilities.name: Create Astral Domain
classAbilities.description: Same as Astral Lord power of the same name; domains tend to be small due to lower P.P.E. May co-build elaborate shared domains with one or two humans (rarely another Millek; seldom more than three total) — `metadata.createAstralDomainAstralLordParity` (pp. 64–65).

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Martial Arts
classAbilities.description: All Millek have the equivalent of Hand to Hand: Martial Arts — shadow O.C.C. `handToHandRules.defaultSkillId: hth_martial_arts` (p. 65).

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 on initiative, +1 on perception, +2 to parry and dodge, +3 save vs magic and psionics, +5 save vs horror factor — parry/dodge/saves in `innateBonuses.modifiers`; initiative/perception in `metadata` (p. 65).

classAbilities.name: Materialization Limits
classAbilities.description: Cannot materialize on Earth or the Nightlands without astral projection or astral transference — visits the material world as a ghost-like astral traveler only (`metadata.cannotMaterializeOnPhysicalWorld`) (pp. 65–66).

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Dependency
classAbilities.description: Derives nourishment from ambient Astral Plane P.P.E.; outside the Plane must stay within 3 miles (4.8 km) of a ley line or nexus or lose 1D6 P.P.E. and 1D4 H.P. per day — coma and death within 24 hours if not returned to P.P.E.-rich area. See `innateBonuses.activation` and `metadata` (pp. 65–66).

classAbilities.name: Psionically Attuned Staff
classAbilities.description: Starting gear — 2D6 damage to most astral beings; double damage against entities and Necrophim (`metadata.attunedStaffDamageAstral`, `attunedStaffDamageMultiplierEntitiesNecrophim`) (p. 66).

classAbilities.name: Culture & Organization
classAbilities.description: Freedom-loving anarchists — distrust large groups; prefer bands of 2–3, rarely join tribes over a dozen. Only follow teachers for learning. Evil Millek almost unheard of (`demographics.excludedAlignments`) (pp. 64–65).

classAbilities.name: Enemies & Allies
classAbilities.description: Clash with Necrophim (`metadata.enemyRaceIds`); hatred for Nightlords and minions. Collaborate with human/Nightbane astral travelers; act as teachers. Low-level PCs do not start with astral entity servants (`metadata.lowLevelPcNoStartingEntityServants`) (pp. 65–66).

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Young PCs typically 1st–2nd level (`metadata.typicalPcStartLevel`); sages 1D4+3 (4–7); old sages 1D6+9 — `between_shadows_millek_astral_mage` via shadow O.C.C. (pp. 65–66).

name: Tarantuloid
description: Optional astral-native R.C.C. (GM approval) — fur-covered six-eyed humanoids with four arms and four legs; dominant astral race forging greysteel and moss-farming. GM may allow PCs in astral-centered campaigns. Choose Warrior/Craftsman/Farmer or Sorcerer-Priest at creation via `occ_tarantuloid_rcc` specializations. Cannot materialize on the physical world. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_tarantuloid_rcc` (auto-mounted). Typical NPC warriors/slavers 1D6; sorcerer-priests 1D6+2.

activation.duration: until strand is destroyed or dismissed
activation.save: Ectoplasmic webs — 80 S.D.C. per strand; very sticky (snare, block passageways, or climb)

classAbilities.name: Astral Creature Senses
classAbilities.description: See the invisible and natural astral creature abilities — equivalent to astral projection and astral navigation powers (`metadata.seeInvisible`, `astralProjectionNavigationParity`) (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Ectoplasmic Webs
classAbilities.description: Manipulate ambient ectoplasm into sticky webs (80 S.D.C. per strand); one melee action per strand; range 50 feet (15.2 m) — snare, block, or climb. See `innateBonuses.activation` and `metadata.ectoplasmicWebStrandSdc` (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Materialization Limits
classAbilities.description: Cannot materialize on the physical world; may travel invisibly and intangibly on Earth or the Nightlands but seldom do (`metadata.cannotMaterializeOnPhysicalWorld`) (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat Attacks
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand as per purchased program plus two additional attacks per melee round — `innateBonuses.modifiers.apm` (`metadata.naturalAttacksBonusPerMelee`) (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 on initiative, +2 to parry, +2 to pull punch, +3 save vs horror factor — parry/pull punch/save in `innateBonuses.modifiers`; initiative in `metadata.initiativeBonus` (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Hit Points per Level
classAbilities.description: P.E.+12 at 1st level (`vitals.hpFormula`); +1D6 H.P. per level of experience (`metadata.hitPointsPerLevel`) (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Innate Psionics
classAbilities.description: Mind Block, Empathy, Presence Sense on all branches — shadow O.C.C. `ispEngine.grantedAbilityIds` (`metadata.shadowOccPsionicGrantIds`). I.S.P. M.E.+4D6, +1D6/level (p. 69).

classAbilities.name: Sorcerer-Priest Branch
classAbilities.description: Magic only for `occ_tarantuloid_sorcerer_priest` — six spells levels 1–4 at 1st, +1/level; must be Principled or Aberrant (`metadata.sorcererPriestAllowedAlignments`). Guardian XP table override (`metadata.xpTableIdSorcererPriest`) (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Warrior / Craftsman / Farmer Branch
classAbilities.description: No spellcasting — `occ_tarantuloid_warrior` specialization. Greysteel forging and moss-farming culture (`metadata.greysteelForging`, `mossFarmingSustenance`). Mystic/Snakebird XP (`metadata.xpTableIdWarrior`) (pp. 68–69).

classAbilities.name: Culture & Encounter
classAbilities.description: Dominant astral race — hundreds of domains and half a dozen kingdoms. Inner Plane parties under ten (slavers or Dragon Road warriors). Distrust humans/Millek (Morr'ken). Typical languages from Earth/Nightlands: 2–4 (p. 69).

classAbilities.name: Weapons & Armor
classAbilities.description: Heavy scimitar 2D6+P.S.; heavy spear 2D8+P.S.; chain mail A.R. 13 (90 S.D.C.) or scale A.R. 15 (100 S.D.C.) — warrior starting gear on `occ_tarantuloid_warrior` (`metadata` damage/AR constants) (p. 69).

classAbilities.name: Enemies & Allies
classAbilities.description: Deadly enemies of the Ba'al and minions (`metadata.enemyFactions`). May befriend Nightbanes and Earth champions against Nightlords (`metadata.allyPatterns`) (p. 69).

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Warriors/slavers average 1D6 level; sorcerer-priests 1D6+2 — `metadata.typicalWarriorSlaverLevel`, `typicalSorcererPriestLevel` (p. 69).

name: Necrophim
description: Optional GM-approval R.C.C. — Angels of Death / Dark Angels; jet-black winged supernatural beings native to the Astral Plane who may serve Nightlords or act as renegades. Implacable enemies of Guardians and vampires. Can materialize on Earth/Nightlands and enter the Dreamstream. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_necrophim_rcc` (auto-mounted). PCs start at 1st level; reputation may provoke attacks from Guardians, Nightbanes, and Spook Squad.

cost.value: 10 winged materialization; +15 additional to appear human or Nightbane-shaped

activation.duration: Materialized winged form: 1 hour per level; human/Nightbane shape-shift: 10 minutes per level
activation.save: Materialization ends astral intangibility and 670 mph flight; human shape cannot fly and magic operates at half effective experience level

metadata.astralFormVisibleToNotes: psychics, children under 13, most supernatural beings including Nightbane

classAbilities.name: Astral Form
classAbilities.description: Pure psychic energy — Astral Plane run/float at attribute speed; on Earth/Nightlands invisible to most, fly up to 670 mph (1072 km/h), pass through walls; harmed only by magic, psionics, and supernatural attacks until materialized. See `metadata.astralForm*` constants (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Materialization
classAbilities.description: 10 P.P.E. for winged physical form — 1 hour per level. Additional 15 P.P.E. to appear human or Nightbane-shaped (10 min/level; no flight; magic at half effective level). See `innateBonuses.activation` and `metadata.materialization*` / `shapeShift*` (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Dreamstream Entry
classAbilities.description: Dreamdance: Superior (`metadata.dreamdanceSuperiorPsionicId`) from astral or materialized Earth. Cannot manipulate dream matter (`metadata.cannotManipulateDreamMatter`). Dream manipulation saves +2 at 1st, +1 at levels 4/7/10/13 — `occ_necrophim_rcc` `staticBonuses.levelGatedSaves.save_dream_manipulation` (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Multi-Plane Vitals
classAbilities.description: Astral: no S.D.C., H.P. P.E.×5 +2D6/level. Material: P.E.×2 S.D.C. +2D4/level, H.P. 1D4×10+80. Dreamstream: astral H.P. act as dream S.D.C. — `metadata.astralHitPointsFormula`, `materialSdcFormula`, `materialHpFormula` (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Natural Senses
classAbilities.description: See astral forms on all planes; nightvision 200 ft (61 m). Materialized flight 3D4×10 (`metadata.materializedFlightSpd`, `nightvisionFeet`) (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand & Entangle
classAbilities.description: Martial Arts and entangle at 1st level — `metadata.handToHandStyleId`, `entangleAtFirstLevel`; shadow O.C.C. `hth_martial_arts` + `wp_chain` (p. 76).

classAbilities.name: Chain Weapons
classAbilities.description: Wrist chains — 2D6 + supernatural P.S. as whips; entangle to 60 ft (18.3 m). `metadata.chainWhipDamage`, `chainEntangleRangeFeet` (pp. 76–77).

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +1 attack/melee, +2 initiative, +1 perception, +2 dodge when flying, +3 roll with impact/fall, +3 pull punch, +2 save vs magic, +5 save vs horror factor — APM/pull punch/roll/dodge/saves in `innateBonuses.modifiers`; initiative/perception/flying dodge in `metadata` (p. 76).

classAbilities.name: Innate Psionics & Magic
classAbilities.description: Psionics: Mind Block, Presence Sense, See Aura, See the Invisible, Astral Navigation (`metadata.shadowOccPsionicGrantIds`). Magic: eight spells (two per level 1–4) at 1st, +1/level — shadow O.C.C. `ppeEngine` (`roadmap_only`) (pp. 76–77).

classAbilities.name: Universal Language Comprehension
classAbilities.description: Magically speaks all languages in presence; reads after 4 hours' exposure to literate speakers — `metadata.languagesSpeakAllInPresenceMagically` (p. 77).

classAbilities.name: Power Points (P.P.E.)
classAbilities.description: 6D6+6+P.E. at 1st; +3D6/level — `vitals.averageStandardPpe` + `metadata.ppePerLevel` on shadow O.C.C. `ppeEngine` (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Enmities & Reputation
classAbilities.description: Implacable enemies of Guardians (`metadata.enemyRaceIds`) and vampires (`attackOnSightVampireTypes`). Good supernaturals, Nightbanes, Spook Squad may attack on sight (`reputationAttackOnSightBy`). Other Necrophim hunt renegades (`necrophimHuntRenegades`) (pp. 74–76).

classAbilities.name: Renegades & Lore
classAbilities.description: Some renegades claim the Wars of Light and Darkness and service to the One Who Sleeps — tentative alliances with resistance (`metadata.renegadeAlignmentTendencies`, `allyPatternsRenegade`). Nocturnes membership rumored (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: Nightlord Service & Patrols
classAbilities.description: ~10× more numerous on Astral Plane than Earth/Nightlands. Patrols 1–4 (+ Torturians/Hounds/Hunters); bodyguards for Night Princes, Avatars, Ashmedai — `metadata` patrol/bodyguard constants (pp. 75–76).

classAbilities.name: GM Approval & Experience
classAbilities.description: Optional P.C. with GM approval — may serve powers worse than Nightlords. PCs start 1st level (`metadata.pcStartLevel`); NPC average 2D4 (`typicalNpcExperienceLevel`) — `between_shadows_necrophim` (pp. 75–77).
